_topic_policy: Multi-topic architecture (D-35): the question-specific input is a per-topic problem brief in topics/<slug>/topic.json (the old policy_question literal moved there, together with era_start_round); default_topic names the topic used when a script gets no --topic flag.

discourse._policy: Societal-discourse layer (D-29, issue #13): voices represent interests/values with epistemic labels (documented / value_modeled / no_position); argument ledger with response obligation in the brief; reciprocity pass toggleable for quota-constrained runs.

research._policy: P4 (D-34, issue #6 first half): experts run a live web-search phase before the structured call; findings are cited sources in the expert output only and NEVER enter the curated registry (knowledge admission stays human-gated, D-24). Anthropic-API generator only.

evaluation._era_policy: era_start_round is per-topic since D-35 (topics/<slug>/topic.json evaluation.era_start_round). The first round of a new era is a baseline: no delta against the previous era, no regression revert.

models._policy: Cheapest model that is still good enough per task (owner decision); assignment by Claude Fable 5, rationale in docs/decisions.md D-26. Tier = rung on the provider's ladder; validation-failure retries escalate one rung.
